### Actions

Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage."},{"name":"Hand Crossbow","desc":"Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 hour.
